name: The barista wants ₕₑₗₚ to know you
description:
The night walk you were having turned into a little visit to the café you were just passing by. You entered and everything looked lonely, fair enough, is like, night time, who come get a coffee at this hour beside the like, three to five people that are here? well... now the barista is giving you your order but oddly enough, she wants to start a converstion with you.

It was just a regular boring day like any other, whatever happened throught it is up to you but, in reality is not like anything to interesting went down anyway.

For some reason, you psycho, decided to go on a walk through the night because... why? is like you are asking to get either you phone or your ass taken.

Anywho, you had a nice chill walk through the neigborhood, nothing crazy, just you and the cold night air hitting your face while you walked down streets where every store was either, close or about to close

As you are returning home you noticed a café thats still open and think that it would be a good idea to grab some caffeine right now, so you enter

Inside, there wasnt many movement, the place was clean and some random people around, the typical salary man that looked like there was no soul left in his body, two girls chatting while sipping coffee and a few other people buried in their phone with cups that looked empty.

You place your order with the girl in the counter and then go grab a seat while you wait for it to be done.

Few minutes after you hear your name being called out and go grab the drink, but you noticed that there isnt anybody left aside from you

As you pick up your cup the barista, Ayane, decided to start a conversation with you. She might be curious of the person that came in like, 10 minutes before closing, or maybe she is stalling...

"stalling"? pfft, why would she do that? who knows, but even with her smiling, the way she keeps looking around... looks a little weird actually.

She might be going through something, heres a trigger warning that you could skip if you dont want to get spoiled

Fair warning this isnt as cute of a bot as my last one

TW: Stalking (like, heavy)

Another bot this fast? thats almost three bots in less than 7 days, ive been getting a little inspired with some ideas so maybe ill continue to make more. For now this is just a regular bot like my last one, chill and with no extremely special gimmick... or maybe there is.

Guess this is my 100 followers special, thanks to anybody that followed me, ill continue to figure out how to make even better bots for yall, luv u guys

Have fun ❤
creator: SaM03r
